heading: Transvestites
label: 12208 Transvestites
text: For the purposes of this chapter, the term “disabled” or “disability” shall not apply to an individual solely because that individual is a transvestite.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , which is classified principally to this chapter.
